purpose: Narrative structure for Idle Kingdom Revolution - chapter-based story with expandable lore, side content, and integration with gameplay systems.

narrative_premise.setting: The world of Aethoria - a fractured realm where kingdoms war for control of ancient magical artifacts. The player is a displaced noble who must rebuild their kingdom from ruins.
narrative_premise.hook: Your kingdom was destroyed by the Shadow Legion. Surviving with a small band of loyal soldiers, you must reclaim your lands, forge alliances, and discover the truth behind the invasion.
narrative_premise.tone: Epic fantasy with moments of humor. Not grimdark - hopeful and adventurous.

chapter_structure.format: Each chapter = 1 major story arc = 5-10 battle fields + 3-5 story quests + 1 boss fight + lore unlocks
chapter_structure.unlock_pattern: Complete previous chapter OR reach required player level
chapter_structure.replayability: Chapters can be replayed on higher difficulties for better rewards
chapter_structure.expansion_ready: New chapters added via admin panel without code changes

chapter_1_awakening.title: Chapter 1: The Awakening
chapter_1_awakening.subtitle: From the ashes, a kingdom rises
chapter_1_awakening.plot: Player awakens in ruins of their castle. Meets first companions. Fights off scavengers. Discovers the Crown of Aethoria (artifact) survived. Vows to rebuild.
chapter_1_awakening.boss: Scavenger King - greedy warlord looting the ruins
rewards: First hero unit (Knight Captain)", "Castle restoration (hub unlock)", "Crown of Aethoria (passive gold bonus)"],
: ["History of the Shadow Legion", "The Crown's legend", "Your family's fall"],
: ["Elf faction units unlock", "Alliance banner (faction synergy bonus)", "Forest outpost (resource generation)"],
rewards.: \"Chapter 3: The March North\",\n:
: 8,
      "boss": "Frost Wyrm - ancient dragon corrupted by the Legion",
      "rewards": ["Dwarf faction units unlock", "Iceforge (equipment upgrade building)", "Frost Resistance perk"],
      "lore_unlocks": ["Dwarven kingdoms", "The Frost Wyrm's curse", "Legion's northern operations"],
      "new_systems_unlocked": ["Equipment forging", "Perk system", "Mountain outpost"]
    },
    
    "chapter_4_secrets": {
      "title": "Chapter 4: Unveiled Secrets",
      "subtitle": "The truth beneath the throne",
      "setting": "Ancient underground ruins and forgotten libraries",
      "plot": "Researching Crown reveals it has dark counterpart - the Shadow Crown. Player's ancestor may have created both. Moral dilemma: use Crown's power or destroy it?",
      "battles": 6,
      "boss": "Shadow Guardian - protector of the ancient secret",
      "rewards": ["Mythic tier unlock", "Shadow Resist perk tree", "Ancient Library (research speed bonus)"],
      "lore_unlocks": ["The Twin Crowns", "Your ancestor's sin", "Prophecy of the Two Kingdoms"],
      "new_systems_unlocked": ["Mythic units", "Moral choices (affect future chapters)", "Research system"]
    },
    
    "chapter_5_siege": {
      "title": "Chapter 5: The Siege",
      "subtitle": "The Legion comes home",
      "setting": "Player's rebuilt castle under attack",
      "plot": "Shadow Legion launches full assault on player's kingdom. All alliances tested. Must defend castle while launching counter-attack. First major branching point based on earlier choices.",
      "battles": 10,
      "boss": "Legion Commander - the one who destroyed your kingdom",
      "rewards": ["Castle tier 2 upgrade", "Legendary unit unlock", "Siege Defense perk tree"],
      "lore_unlocks": ["The Legion Commander's identity", "Your family's secret", "The true enemy revealed"],
      "new_systems_unlocked": ["Castle defense", "Siege battles", "Alliance war"]
    },
    
    "chapter_6_beyond": {
      "title": "Chapter 6: Beyond the Veil",
      "subtitle": "The realm between worlds",
      "setting": "Shadow dimension - twisted mirror of Aethoria",
      "plot": "Victory reveals the Shadow Legion was merely a vanguard. True threat lies in shadow dimension. Player must enter and confront the source. Major branching endings based on all choices.",
      "battles": 12,
      "boss": "The Shadow King - ancient entity behind the invasion",
      "rewards": ["True ending unlock", "New Game+ mode", "Cosmetic rewards based on choices"],
      "lore_unlocks": ["The Shadow King's origin", "The creation of Aethoria", "Your destiny"],
      "new_systems_unlocked": ["New Game+", "Shadow dimension exploration", "Epilogue mode"]
    }
  },
  
  "side_content_structure": {
    "daily_stories": {
      "description": "Small narrative vignettes that rotate daily",
      "examples": [
        "A villager reports strange lights in the forest (leads to mini-quest)",
        "Your blacksmith shares their backstory (lore unlock)",
        "Scout reports enemy movement (bonus battle available)"
      ],
      "reward": "Small gold/XP + lore fragment"
    },
    "character_quests": {
      "description": "Individual hero backstory quests",
      "structure": "3-part quest chain per hero. Unlocks at friendship level thresholds.",
      "reward": "Hero upgrade, unique equipment, lore"
    },
    "world_events": {
      "description": "Server-wide events with narrative hooks",
      "examples": [
        "The Comet: Rare comet appears, all battles give 2x XP for 24h",
        "The Plague: Undead spawn rate increases, special cure quest line",
        "The Tournament: PvP tournament with story justification"
      ],
      "frequency": "1-2 per week, scheduled via admin"
    },
    "lore_collection": {
      "description": "Collectible lore entries scattered throughout game",
      "categories": ["World History", "Character Bios", "Bestiary", "Artifact Lore", "Faction Histories"],
      "unlock_methods": ["Battle drops", "Quest rewards", "Hidden in maps", "Achievement unlocks"],
      "completion_reward": "Special title + cosmetic + small permanent stat bonus"
    }
  },
  
  "dialogue_system": {
    "format": "Visual Novel style - character portrait + dialogue box",
    "features": [
      "Branching choices (affect reputation, unlocks, future events)",
      "Voice-over placeholder (text-to-speech or silent for now)",
      "Skip option for repeat playthroughs",
      "Auto-play option",
      "Dialogue log (can review past conversations)"
    ],
    "choice_impact": {
      "minor": "Flavor text, small reputation change",
      "medium": "Unlock/lock certain quests, affect shop prices",
      "major": "Determine chapter endings, unlock/lock future chapters",
      "epic": "Determine final ending, New Game+ bonuses"
    }
  },
  
  "narrative_integration": {
    "battle_narration": "Commander calls out tactics during boss fights",
    "victory_lines": "Units have unique victory quotes based on personality",
    "defeat_lines": "Encouraging dialogue on defeat, not game over screen",
    "idle_dialogue": "Hub characters have ambient dialogue that changes with story progress",
    "mail_narrative": "Story updates delivered via in-game mail system"
  }
}
